003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.nio.charset.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
026
027/**
028 * Subclass of {@link SerializerSession} for character-based serializers.
029 *
030 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
031 *
032 * This class is typically the parent class of all character-based serializers.
033 * <br>It has 1 abstract method to implement...
034 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
035 *    <li>
036 *       {@link #doSerialize(SerializerPipe, Object)}
037 * </ul>
038 *
039 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
040 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
041 * </ul>
042 *
043 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
044 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/SerializersAndParsers">Serializers and Parsers</a>
045 * </ul>
046 */
047@SuppressWarnings({
048   "java:S110", // Deep inheritance inherent to the serializer/parser session hierarchy
049   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
050   "resource"   // Internal helpers return Closeables wired into pipe lifecycle; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
051})
052public class WriterSerializerSession extends SerializerSession {
053
054   // Property name constants
055   private static final String PROP_fileCharset = "fileCharset";
056   private static final String PROP_streamCharset = "streamCharset";
057   private static final String PROP_useWhitespace = "useWhitespace";
058   private static final String PROP_maxIndent = "maxIndent";
059   private static final String PROP_quoteChar = "quoteChar";
060   private static final String PROP_WriterSerializerSession_fileCharset = "WriterSerializerSession.fileCharset";
061   private static final String PROP_WriterSerializerSession_streamCharset = "WriterSerializerSession.streamCharset";
062   private static final String PROP_WriterSerializerSession_useWhitespace = "WriterSerializerSession.useWhitespace";
063   private static final String PROP_WriterSerializerSession_maxIndent = "WriterSerializerSession.maxIndent";
064   private static final String PROP_WriterSerializerSession_quoteChar = "WriterSerializerSession.quoteChar";
065
066   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
067   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
068
069   /**
070    * Builder class.
071    */
072   @SuppressWarnings({
073      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
074   })
075   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends SerializerSession.Builder<SELF> {
076
077      private boolean useWhitespace;
078      private Charset fileCharset;
079      private Charset streamCharset;
080      private int maxIndent;
081      private char quoteChar;
082
083      /**
084       * Constructor
085       *
086       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
087       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
088       */
089      protected Builder(WriterSerializer ctx) {
090         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
091         fileCharset = ctx.getFileCharset();
092         streamCharset = ctx.getStreamCharset();
093         useWhitespace = ctx.useWhitespace;
094         maxIndent = ctx.getMaxIndent();
095         quoteChar = ctx.getQuoteChar();
096      }
097
098      @Override
099      public WriterSerializerSession build() {
100         return new WriterSerializerSession(this);
101      }
102
103      /**
104       * File charset.
105       *
106       * <p>
107       * The character set to use for writing Files to the file system.
108       *
109       * <p>
110       * Used when passing in files to {@link Serializer#serialize(Object, Object)}.
111       *
112       * <p>
113       * If not specified, defaults to the JVM system default charset.
114       *
115       * @param value
116       *    The new property value.
117       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (value will not be set, defaults to JVM system default charset).
118       * @return This object.
119       */
120      public SELF fileCharset(Charset value) {
121         if (nn(value))
122            fileCharset = value;
123         return self();
124      }
125
126      /**
127       * Maximum indentation.
128       *
129       * @param value The new value for this property.
130       * @return This object.
131       */
132      public SELF maxIndent(int value) {
133         maxIndent = value;
134         return self();
135      }
136
137      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
138      public SELF property(String key, Object value) {
139         if (key == null) {
140            super.property(key, value);
141            return self();
142         }
143         switch (key) {
144            case PROP_fileCharset, PROP_WriterSerializerSession_fileCharset:
145               return fileCharset(cvt(value, Charset.class));
146            case PROP_streamCharset, PROP_WriterSerializerSession_streamCharset:
147               return streamCharset(cvt(value, Charset.class));
148            case PROP_useWhitespace, PROP_WriterSerializerSession_useWhitespace:
149               return useWhitespace(cvt(value, Boolean.class));
150            case PROP_maxIndent, PROP_WriterSerializerSession_maxIndent:
151               return maxIndent(cvt(value, Integer.class));
152            case PROP_quoteChar, PROP_WriterSerializerSession_quoteChar:
153               return quoteChar(cvt(value, Character.class));
154            default:
155               super.property(key, value);
156               return self();
157         }
158      }
159
160      /**
161       * Quote character.
162       *
163       * @param value The new value for this property.
164       * @return This object.
165       */
166      public SELF quoteChar(char value) {
167         quoteChar = value;
168         return self();
169      }
170
171      /**
172       * Output stream charset.
173       *
174       * <p>
175       * The character set to use when writing to OutputStreams.
176       *
177       * <p>
178       * Used when passing in output streams and byte arrays to {@link WriterSerializer#serialize(Object, Object)}.
179       *
180       * <p>
181       * If not specified, defaults to UTF-8.
182       *
183       * @param value
184       *    The new property value.
185       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (value will not be set, defaults to UTF-8).
186       * @return This object.
187       */
188      public SELF streamCharset(Charset value) {
189         if (nn(value))
190            streamCharset = value;
191         return self();
192      }
193
194      /**
195       * Use whitespace.
196       *
197       * <p>
198       * If true, whitespace is added to the output to improve readability.
199       *
200       * @param value
201       *    The new property value.
202       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (value will not be set, existing value from context will be kept).
203       * @return This object.
204       */
205      public SELF useWhitespace(Boolean value) {
206         if (nn(value))
207            useWhitespace = value;
208         return self();
209      }
210   }
211
212   /**
213    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@code create()} path (CRTP terminal).
214    */
215   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
216
217      DefaultBuilder(WriterSerializer ctx) {
218         super(ctx);
219      }
220   }
221
222   /**
223    * Creates a new builder for this object.
224    *
225    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
226    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
227    * @return A new builder.
228    */
229   @SuppressWarnings({
230      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers use it to construct session instances polymorphically
231   })
232   public static Builder<?> create(WriterSerializer ctx) {
233      return new DefaultBuilder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
234   }
235
236   private final boolean useWhitespace;
237   private final Charset fileCharset;
238   private final Charset streamCharset;
239   private final int maxIndent;
240   private final char quoteChar;
241
242   /**
243    * Constructor.
244    *
245    * @param builder The builder for this object.
246    */
247   protected WriterSerializerSession(Builder<?> builder) {
248      super(builder);
249      fileCharset = builder.fileCharset;
250      streamCharset = builder.streamCharset;
251      useWhitespace = builder.useWhitespace;
252      maxIndent = builder.maxIndent;
253      quoteChar = builder.quoteChar;
254   }
255
256   /**
257    * Returns the file charset defined on this session.
258    *
259    * @return the file charset defined on this session.
260    */
261   public Charset getFileCharset() { return fileCharset; }
262
263   /**
264    * Returns the stream charset defined on this session.
265    *
266    * @return the stream charset defined on this session.
267    */
268   public Charset getStreamCharset() { return streamCharset; }
269
270   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
271   public final boolean isWriterSerializer() { return true; }
272
273   /**
274    * Convenience method for serializing an object to a <c>String</c>.
275    *
276    * @param o The object to serialize.
277    * @return The output serialized to a string.
278    * @throws SerializeException If a problem occurred trying to convert the output.
279    */
280   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
281   public final String serialize(Object o) throws SerializeException {
282      var w = new StringWriter();
283      try {
284         serialize(o, w);
285      } catch (IOException e) {
286         throw new SerializeException(e); // Shouldn't happen.
287      }
288      return w.toString();
289   }
290
291   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
292   public final String serializeToString(Object o) throws SerializeException {
293      return serialize(o);
294   }
295
296   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
297   protected SerializerPipe createPipe(Object output) {
298      return new SerializerPipe(output, streamCharset, fileCharset);
299   }
300
301   /**
302    * Maximum indentation.
303    *
304    * @see WriterSerializer.Builder#maxIndent(int)
305    * @return
306    *    The maximum indentation level in the serialized document.
307    */
308   protected final int getMaxIndent() { return maxIndent; }
309
310   /**
311    * Quote character.
312    *
313    * @see WriterSerializer.Builder#quoteChar(char)
314    * @return
315    *    The character used for quoting attributes and values.
316    */
317   protected char getQuoteChar() { return quoteChar; }
318
319   /**
320    * Use whitespace.
321    *
322    * @see WriterSerializer.Builder#useWhitespace()
323    * @return
324    *    The character used for quoting attributes and values.
325    */
326   protected final boolean isUseWhitespace() { return useWhitespace; }
327
328   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
329   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
330      return super.properties()
331         .a(PROP_fileCharset, fileCharset)
332         .a(PROP_streamCharset, streamCharset)
333         .a(PROP_useWhitespace, useWhitespace)
334         .a(PROP_maxIndent, maxIndent)
335         .a(PROP_quoteChar, quoteChar);
336   }
337}
